title: Named customers (LIKE)
prompt: Most customers have a generic name like "Customer 12". Using LIKE, return only the "named" customers — those whose name does NOT start with "Customer ". Single column name, alphabetical.

requires.message: This question is about LIKE — use a LIKE pattern.

hints: LIKE matches patterns; % is any run of characters.
Exclude the generic names with WHERE name NOT LIKE 'Customer %'.
